title: Too Many Creepers
description: As if we didn't have enough...
body:
Adds lots of creepers in the old style of mods.


<details>
<summary>The Devlogs</summary>

#1
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zGlOFH7zIrI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>




<details>
<summary>Creeper Types</summary>
  
<details>
<summary>Gravity Creeper</summary>

Temporarily flips the gravity of affected objects

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pig Creeper</summary>

Affected blocks are replaced with angry pigs

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spawner Creeper</summary>
  Comes in 3 variants. One summons blaze. One summons zombies. One summons spiders. They all have a spawn count variable that is for the number of mobs they can spawn. When they explode, they release all remaining ones. There is an easter egg variant that is unlocked by naming one of them “Dark”. The blaze summoning one drops blazed gunpowder. The spider one drops infested gunpowder. The zombie one drops rotten gunpowder. Rotten one turns animals into Xp mites that get you levels quickly. The infested one turns some affected blocks into cobwebs allowing for renewable cobwebs in java. The blaze one does the same thing except it replaces with fire not cobwebs.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Creaker</summary>

The Creaker is a new creeper type that can be powered by a black beacon and only attacks players when they are low on health. When killed, it grants the player status effects based on what it was powered with.

To get the Black Beacon. You must get a nether Reactor core crafted with Diamond blocks and Iron Blocks. Power it by placing gold blocks at the edges beneath it and the rest of 3x3 square beneath it should  be filled with cobblestone, right click to activate it. The blocks will be turned to glowing obsidian and it will be set dormant. On the second floor of the nether spire, you will find crying ghasts that bomb you with projectiles that hurt all nearby entities. Upon defeating a crying ghast, it drops a few dark fragments, using 5 dark fragments, 3 obsidian, and a nether star, you can craft the black beacon.

Power it by throwing a dark fragment on it. It will most likely fail and summon a black blaze. Black Blazes are shielded from the front. You can either hit them from above, break the shield or attack it from the sides by overwhelming it with other players. It will sometimes summon blazes. Upon death it drops a black blaze rod that can be used to power and make a black brewing stand.

Black brewing stands have 3 slots: an outpot slot, and 2 input slots. Put a black blaze rod in the input slot directly above the output slot to fuel the black blaze rod. At the moment, the slots may be difficult to find because the crafting table gui texture is being used as a placeholder. You can put an iron ingot in the input slot and wait for it to become a blazed iron ingot. Blazed iron ingot can be turned into a blazed iron pickaxe. 5 glowing obsidian can be put in the other input slot and a netherite pickaxe can be put in the first input slot. Give it 15 seconds an you will get yourself a glowing obsidian pickaxe, glowing obsidian pickaxes can break reinforced deepslate but are slow. When breaking a block, it will break blocks around it in a 3x3 square.

Back to the creaker, if the dark fragment throw succeeds, all nearby creakers will be powered based on the 3x3 square under the black beacon. Diamond is for speed, Gold is for haste, Iron is for strength, Netherite is for resistance. The amount of same blocks stack the effect up to level 5. If it is resistacne, then it will only stack up to 4. 

</details>

</details>

**Rotten TNT Recipe**

![Rotten Tnt Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01fcd050fb21ffe53ec43b75e711ee4858b3e6bd_0.webp)

**Infested TNT Recipe**

![Infested TnT Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ed081e7fe4ec71d3a65323807a8bb7501cf6c70_0.webp)

**Blaze TNT Recipe**

![Blaze TnT Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca2c19478133fed38e4391d9ea27e9b4c22055d9_0.webp)

**Gravity TNT Recipe**

![Gravity TNT Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43a78635666e6dacd99154fd8ec745cb75be0ec6_0.webp)

I hope that you enjoy this mod because those creepers are NO JOKE. They are difficult and unique. One more thing, Creepers will now melee attack you 10 times before all of them can explode. Upon your death, to explode they will have to melee attack you 10 times again.
